title: SVGs of the container/ project logos?
body: This repository contains logos of some projects in the containers org here: https://github.com/containers/common/tree/main/logos, but that directory only contains png versions of the logos. Are there svg versions around? I'd like to use them for slides where they'd be a better fit

comments.body: @TomSweeneyRedHat and/or @mairin might know if we have SVG files of them that we can share.

Maybe @mairin has them tucked away elsewhere, but the only svg I found was the main Podman Logo: https://github.com/containers/podman.io_old/blob/main/old/images/podman_orig.svg  and https://github.com/containers/podman.io/blob/main/static/vectors/raw/podman.svg

Yep I have them or can find them. In what repo / folder would you like
them? ~m

The logos/artwork was has to be submitted to some CNCF repo, https://github.com/cncf/artwork/pull/581
Not sure if this covers everything you have.

cc @ashley-cui

> The logos/artwork was has to be submitted to some CNCF repo, [cncf/artwork#581](https://github.com/cncf/artwork/pull/581) Not sure if this covers everything you have.

Does that include only podman or also all the other projects (buildah, crun, bootc, skopeo, etc)
